inline_comments.message: are you sure that we may really just drop it like that? I see this variable being used in other functions?

No, I suspected there was a problem with that.
That's why I split the original change 119192 where I first removed them.

There is no POSIX equivalent for this statement, the advice is simply to remove them and try parameters through commands.
I just wanted to evaluate the impact of their removal at this stage.

https://mywiki.wooledge.org/Bashism#Builtins
https://wiki.ubuntu.com/DashAsBinSh#declare_or_typeset
